stages.label: Apply Supabase schema
stages.detail: Set SUPABASE_DB_URL to the Supabase project Postgres connection string, for example postgresql://postgres:<password>@db.<ref>.supabase.co:5432/postgres.

stages.label: Verify account auth redirect
stages.detail: Google OAuth and magic links redirect to https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/.

stages.label: Seed account, proof and leaderboard rows
stages.detail: 6/6 Supabase target env keys collected; waiting for write prerequisites.

stages.label: Verify Supabase read-back
stages.detail: Verify public REST reads, target rows, share artifacts and global/friend/season leaderboard scopes.

nextAction: Apply Supabase schema: set SUPABASE_DB_URL first.
copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent Supabase production bootstrap
Mode: plan
Stages: 0/4 ready or done
Missing env: SUPABASE_DB_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
Next action: Apply Supabase schema: set SUPABASE_DB_URL first.
Commands:
- bun run supabase:schema:check
- bun run runtime:config:check
- bun run seed:production-targets --dry-run
- bun run doctor:supabase
Stages:
- Apply Supabase schema [blocked]
  command: bun run supabase:schema:check
  execute: bun run supabase:schema:apply
  requires: SUPABASE_DB_URL
  missing: SUPABASE_DB_URL
  outputs: kickoff_profiles, kickoff_records, kickoff_mode_runs, kickoff_share_artifacts, kickoff_leaderboard
  detail: Set SUPABASE_DB_URL to the Supabase project Postgres connection string, for example postgresql://postgres:<password>@db.<ref>.supabase.co:5432/postgres.
- Verify account auth redirect [blocked]
  command: bun run runtime:config:check
  execute: bun run runtime:config:check
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_REDIRECT_URL
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: Google OAuth authorize URL, magic-link redirect URL
  detail: Google OAuth and magic links redirect to https://olive8882-1996.github.io/kickoff-lock-agent/.
- Seed account, proof and leaderboard rows [blocked]
  command: bun run seed:production-targets --dry-run
  execute: bun run seed:production-targets --upload-share-image --upload-mode-share-image
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, KICKOFF_SEED_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_SEED_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY
  detail: 6/6 Supabase target env keys collected; waiting for write prerequisites.
- Verify Supabase read-back [blocked]
  command: bun run doctor:supabase
  execute: bun run doctor:supabase
  requires: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_SUPABASE_URL
  outputs: supabase production evidence
  detail: Verify public REST reads, target rows, share artifacts and global/friend/season leaderboard scopes.
